nasb.text: Nevertheless my brethren who went up with me made the heart of the people melt with fear; but I followed the Lord my God fully.

esv.text: But my brothers who went up with me made the heart of the people melt; yet I wholly followed the Lord my God.

cnv.text: 可是，與我一同上去的眾兄弟卻使人民的心驚懼，我卻完全順從耶和華我的　神。

ccb.text: 与我同去的弟兄的禀告令以色列人胆战心惊，但我忠心地追随我的上帝耶和华。
